## Type of change
- [ ] 🔎 Source verification (flag promotion)
- [ ] ✍️ Dossier authoring / deepening
- [ ] ➕ New problem (registry + dossier)
- [ ] 📏 Ranking refinement (score change)
- [ ] 🛠️ Build / tooling / docs

## Summary


## Sourcing & integrity checklist
- [ ] No unverified citation is presented as established fact
- [ ] New/changed papers carry a verification flag (`verified` / `high-confidence` / `needs-verification` / `ai-suggested`)
- [ ] If a flag was promoted to `verified`, I confirmed the source exists **and** says what is claimed
- [ ] Generated files were produced by `python scripts/generate.py`, not hand-edited
- [ ] `python scripts/generate.py --check` and `python scripts/validate.py` pass locally
